Question: For the vectors given in Figure 2.13, find the scalar products $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \cdotp \mathbf{\vec{B}}$$ and $$\mathbf{\vec{F}} \cdotp \mathbf{\vec{C}}$$ .

For vector $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} = A_{x} \mathbf{\hat{i}} + A_{y} \mathbf{\hat{j}} + A_{z} \mathbf{\hat{k}}$$ in a rectangular coordinate system, use Equation 2.29 through Equation 2.32 to show that $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \cdotp \mathbf{\hat{i}} = A_{x}$$ $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \cdotp \mathbf{\hat{j}} = A_{y}$$ and $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \cdotp \mathbf{\hat{k}} = A_{z}$$ .
Find the angle between forces $$\mathbf{\vec{F}}_{1}$$ and $$\mathbf{\vec{F}}_{3}$$ in Example 2.16.
How much work is done by the first dog and by the second dog in Example 2.16 on the displacement in Example 2.17?
For the vectors given in Figure 2.13, find the vector products $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \times \mathbf{\vec{B}}$$ and $$\mathbf{\vec{C}} \times \mathbf{\vec{F}}$$ .
Answer: $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \times \mathbf{\vec{B}} = -40.1 \mathbf{\hat{k}}$$ or, equivalently, $$| \mathbf{\vec{A}} \times \mathbf{\vec{B}} | = 40.1$$ , and the direction is into the page; $$\mathbf{\vec{C}} \times \mathbf{\vec{F}} = + 157.6 \mathbf{\hat{k}}$$ or, equivalently, $$| \mathbf{\vec{C}} \times \mathbf{\vec{F}} | = 157.6$$ , and the direction is out of the page.

Question: Given two vectors $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} = \text{unicode[:-]} \mathbf{\hat{i}} + \mathbf{\hat{j}}$$ and $$\mathbf{\vec{B}} = 3 \mathbf{\hat{i}} - \mathbf{\hat{j}}$$ , find (a) $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \times \mathbf{\vec{B}}$$ , (b) $$| \mathbf{\vec{A}} \times \mathbf{\vec{B}} |$$ , (c) the angle between $$\mathbf{\vec{A}}$$ and $$\mathbf{\vec{B}}$$ , and (d) the angle between $$\mathbf{\vec{A}} \times \mathbf{\vec{B}}$$ and vector $$\mathbf{\vec{C}} = \mathbf{\hat{i}} + \mathbf{\hat{k}}$$ .
